title: Avian influenza A(H7N9) - Canada.ca
content:
## Avian influenza A(H7N9)
Learn about avian influenza A(H7N9), its causes, symptoms, risks, treatment and prevention. Also find information on surveillance and for health professionals.

## Services and information
Explore the cause of avian influenza A(H7N9), how it is spread and where it is found.
Learn about the symptoms, what to look for and what to do if you become ill.
Find out what the risks are and who is most at risk.
Access information on how avian influenza A(H7N9) is diagnosed and how it is treated.
Learn how avian influenza A(H7N9) can be prevented.
Discover how avian influenza A(H7N9) is monitored.

### For health professionals
Get detailed information for health professionals.
